title: Trump renews criticism of UK, saying it should ‘drill, baby, drill’ for North Sea oil
summary_full: Trump's comments come at a time when the U.K. government has said the Iran war energy shock shows the need “to get off the fossil fuel rollercoaster.”
summary_public: Trump's comments come at a time when the U.K. government has said the Iran war energy shock shows the need “to get off the fossil fuel rollercoaster.”
